title: COVID-19 loan guarantee schemes repayment data: June 2025
body: "This publication is the quarterly performance update on the COVID-19 loan guarantee schemes, inclusive of:   the Bounce Back Loans Scheme (BBLS) the Coronavirus Business Interruption Loan Scheme (CBILS) the Coronavirus Large Business Interruption Loan Scheme (CLBILS)   Data points are aligned across schemes, with lender level data on all portfolios. Scheme level data is also available in the aggregated totals included in the tables.  As part of the government’s ongoing commitment to provide transparency on scheme performance, supplemental data is included on guarantee removals and additional activities that reduce the taxpayer obligations under scheme guarantees.  "

taxons.title: Funding and support for businesses during COVID-19
